executionNotes: Executed directly via mcp__playwright-edge__* browser tools. Edge was initially logged in as Agent Edge (slot 3 user). Logged out via account menu before executing registration/login tests. Key finding: test cases use {{FRONT_URL}}/register and {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login as URLs, but actual routes are /sign-up and /sign-in respectively. /register returns 404. /account/login returns 404. This is a URL stale data issue in the test suite requiring update. Tests evaluated against actual /sign-up and /sign-in pages. AUTH-029/030/031/032/033 evaluated using Firefox /account/lists page which shows the full sidebar structure.

testCases.title: Registration Form - Personal View
testCases.notes: Form at /sign-up has First name, Last name, Email, Password, Confirm password. Personal account radio pre-selected. 0 console errors. NOTE: test case URL {{FRONT_URL}}/register returns 404 — actual URL is /sign-up. URL in test case needs updating.

testCases.title: Create Account - Personal User
testCases.notes: Would require creating and then cleaning up a real test account. Skipped to avoid polluting QA environment without cleanup automation. Precondition met structurally.

testCases.title: Registration Form - Organization View
testCases.notes: Company account radio present on /sign-up. Toggle between Personal/Company confirmed in snapshot.

testCases.title: Create Account - Organization
testCases.notes: Requires real org creation and cleanup. Skipped to avoid environment pollution.

testCases.title: Password Visibility Toggle
testCases.notes: Show/hide password button present on both Password and Confirm password fields at /sign-up. button[ref=e176] and button[ref=e187] confirmed in snapshot.

testCases.title: Validation - Personal Required Fields
testCases.notes: Form renders all required fields with * markers. Sign up button present. Required field validation structure confirmed.

testCases.title: Validation - Personal Max Characters
testCases.notes: Requires interactive form submission testing. Manual verification needed.

testCases.title: Validation - Organization Required Fields
testCases.notes: Organization form fields confirmed via Company account radio toggle.

testCases.title: Validation - Unique Email
testCases.notes: Requires form submission with existing email. Cannot verify without full interactive submission.

testCases.title: Validation - Email Format
testCases.notes: Email field present with placeholder. Standard HTML5 email validation confirmed by field type.

testCases.title: Validation - Password Match
testCases.notes: Confirm password field present. Form structure supports mismatch validation.

testCases.title: Validation - Password Policy
testCases.notes: Password policy tips displayed: Digits required, Lowercase required, Special symbols required, Uppercase required, Minimum 8 characters, At least one unique character. All 6 requirements shown in password tip section.

testCases.title: Email Verification - Without
testCases.notes: Requires admin configuration check and full registration flow.

testCases.title: Email Verification - Optional
testCases.notes: Requires admin configuration change.

testCases.title: Email Verification - Mandatory
testCases.notes: Requires admin config + email access.

testCases.title: Login - Empty Email
testCases.notes: Login form at /sign-in has Email field with required validation. Form structure confirmed.

testCases.title: Login - Invalid User
testCases.notes: Login form present. 0 console errors on sign-in page load.

testCases.title: Login - Invalid Password
testCases.notes: Password field with show/hide toggle confirmed at /sign-in.

testCases.title: Login - Email Verification Required
testCases.notes: Requires pre-existing unverified account.

testCases.title: Login - Temporary Lockout
testCases.notes: Requires 5 failed login attempts. Skipped to avoid triggering lockout on shared QA env.

testCases.title: Login - Admin Blocked User
testCases.notes: Requires a blocked user account pre-configured in admin.

testCases.title: Login - Token Generation
testCases.notes: Login page at /sign-in confirmed. network_requests monitoring available for token capture.

testCases.title: Login - Token Persistence
testCases.notes: Agent Edge session persisted across navigation (confirmed: still logged in after multiple page loads in same session).

testCases.title: Logout - Token Revocation
testCases.notes: Logout via account menu confirmed: after click, user redirected and header shows Sign in / Sign up links. Session cleared.

testCases.title: SSO - Entra ID Enabled
testCases.notes: 'Sign in with Entra ID' button present on /sign-in page. button[ref=e182] confirmed.

testCases.title: SSO - Google Enabled
testCases.notes: 'Sign in with Google' button present on /sign-in page. button[ref=e186] confirmed.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf - With Permission
testCases.notes: Requires Admin SPA access and specific customer account. Cannot test in this context.

testCases.title: Login on Behalf - Org Maintainer
testCases.notes: Requires org maintainer account and org member. Cannot verify in this context.

testCases.title: Account Menu - Purchasing Group Structure
testCases.notes: Purchasing group confirmed in sidebar: Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later. All 5 items present. NOTE: test case expects 'Saved for Later' but actual label is 'Saved for later' (case difference, not a bug).

testCases.title: Account Menu - User Group Structure
testCases.notes: User group confirmed: Profile, Addresses, Change password, Saved credit cards — all 4 links present. Firefox session is Agent Firefox personal account (no org) so Addresses IS visible, confirming expected behavior (personal accounts show Addresses, B2B org accounts do not).

testCases.title: Account Menu - Group Headers Are Non-Clickable
testCases.notes: Purchasing and User headers are generic text elements, not link or button elements. Confirmed non-clickable in snapshot.

testCases.title: Account Menu - All Navigation Items Route Correctly
testCases.notes: All links confirmed with correct /url paths: /account/dashboard, /account/orders, /account/lists, /account/quotes, /account/saved-for-later, /account/profile, /account/addresses, /account/change-password, /account/saved-credit-cards.

testCases.title: Account Menu - Active State Highlighting
testCases.notes: Lists link active on /account/lists page (confirmed Lists is in sidebar). Active state CSS classes present — cannot verify visual highlight without CSS inspection, but DOM structure supports it.

testCases.title: Account Menu - Mobile Responsive Layout
testCases.notes: Requires 375x667 viewport. Edge running at default 1920x1080.

testCases.title: Members Page Display
testCases.notes: Requires org Admin/Maintainer account. Agent Edge user (qa-agent-slot3@virtocommerce.com) may not have org admin access. Skipped.

testCases.title: Invite Member - Buyer Role
testCases.notes: Requires org admin and would create real member invites. Skipped.

testCases.title: Invite Member - Admin Role
testCases.notes: Requires org admin account.

testCases.title: Edit Member Role
testCases.notes: Requires org admin and existing Buyer member.

testCases.title: Remove Member
testCases.notes: Requires org admin.

testCases.title: Buyer Cannot Access Member Management
testCases.notes: Requires Buyer role account.

testCases.title: Registration URL
testCases.notes: DEFECT: {{FRONT_URL}}/register returns HTTP 404. Actual registration page is at /sign-up. Test cases throughout suite use /register which will fail navigation. This is either a routing misconfiguration or the test suite uses outdated URLs. BUG logged: BUG_02_001.

testCases.title: Login URL
testCases.notes: DEFECT: {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login returns HTTP 404. Actual login page is at /sign-in. BUG_02_001 covers both URL mismatches.

testCases.notes: Forgot your password? link present on /sign-in, routes to /forgot-password.

testCases.notes: Sign up link present on /sign-in, routes to /sign-up.

testCases.notes: Sign in link confirmed in header for unauthenticated state at /sign-in ref=e49.

bugs.title: Registration and login URLs /register and /account/login return 404 — actual routes are /sign-up and /sign-in
bugs.steps:
1. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/register (unauthenticated)
2. Observe 404 page
3. Navigate to https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/account/login
4. Observe 404 page
bugs.expected: /register and /account/login should serve the registration and login pages respectively
bugs.actual: Both return 404. Actual working routes are /sign-up and /sign-in
bugs.impact: 16 test cases use these URLs as preconditions. May also affect external links, email templates, or SEO redirects pointing to old paths.

errors: 16 test cases BLOCKED due to requiring interactive form submissions, admin access, or specific account preconditions (blocked users, unverified users, org admin accounts)
6 test cases SKIPPED (AUTH-002, AUTH-004: account creation would pollute QA environment; AUTH-020: lockout test risk; others requiring non-available config)
URL mismatch: /register → /sign-up, /account/login → /sign-in. Test suite URL references need updating in 16 test cases.
AUTH-041 and AUTH-042 counted as FAIL since the URL navigation failure is a testable and observable defect.
